technique_description: Box breathing uses a simple 4-4-4-4 pattern — inhale, hold, exhale, hold — each for four seconds. It activates your parasympathetic nervous system, lowering stress and bringing you back to a calm, focused state.
session_complete_msg: Great job completing your breathing session. Take a moment to notice how your body feels — lighter, steadier, more at ease.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

app_complete_message: You've completed the Box Breathing session. You should feel more balanced and calm.
